source_note: Verified vs Apex help center + multiple 2026 reviews (post-'4.0', Mar 2026). 50K EOD: profit target $3,000 (6%), EOD trailing drawdown $2,500 (5%), Daily Loss Limit $1,000 (2%), NO minimum trading days, 30-day access. EOD trailing LOCKS at the profit-target balance ($53k) on Rithmic/WealthCharts but trails indefinitely on Tradovate - engine uses the non-locking (conservative) version, so real Rithmic odds may be slightly better. The 30% consistency rule applies to FUNDED payouts, not to passing the eval. Fee approximate: 4.0 uses one-time eval (~$20 promo) + $99 PA activation; list varies - verify at checkout.
